blocked_prediction_inputs: native contacts, distance maps, residue-residue proximity, and coordinate-derived topology
native biological assembly contacts and ligand/metal coordination geometry before sealing

prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: PROCAPSID OF BACTERIOPHAGE PHIX174. Entity description: PROTEIN (SCAFFOLDING PROTEIN GPD). Organism: Enterobacteria phage phiX174; Sinsheimervirus phiX174. Polymer composition: heteromeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived membrane tendency high; no membrane topology without explicit E65 topology evidence; sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies; withheld discovery hints: generic_complex_not_assembly_required, generic_membrane_without_explicit_topology. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V69 E65 metadata context marks: generic_complex_only. Known E65 marks are allowed; hard-topology discovery labels are withheld from prediction. generic complex alone is not assembly_required_core. generic membrane or hydrophobicity-only signal is not topology evidence. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: generic membrane or hydrophobicity signal withheld from topology evidence without explicit provider
generic complex wording is not treated as obligate assembly evidence

v69_context_policy.context_derivation: V69 E65 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. It carries established E65 marks but withholds hard-topology missing-word labels from prediction context so V69 can discover them.
reasons: generic membrane or hydrophobicity signal withheld from topology evidence without explicit provider
generic complex wording is not treated as obligate assembly evidence
